summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 7 specific fixes for Retail Book application. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend functionality mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Move button in Required column is not enabled/clickable
ui_bugs.description: Button appears but is disabled, preventing testing of embroidery move functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/settings returns article types, rates, payment modes, addon items, firm details
PDF generation for ref 04/010426 (without tailoring section)
PDF generation for ref 03/010426 (with tailoring section)
Settlement balances API for specific order references
Frontend: Settings page loads with all required sections
Frontend: Settings page has Save button that works
Frontend: Sidebar shows Settings nav item
Frontend: New Bill Enter key navigation (Name→Date→Barcode) works correctly
Frontend: PDF Download button appears after bill save
Frontend: Job Work embroidery tab accessible
Frontend: Tailoring Orders page loads correctly
All basic API endpoints (Dashboard, Customers, Items, Orders, etc.)
PDF invoice generation with NARWANA AGENCIES header
Fabric balance matches expected value (~3370) for ref 04/010426
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Enable the embroidery move button in JobWork Required column. Button appears but is disabled, preventing users from moving embroidery items from Required to In Progress status.
